title: 16 Personalities as Boyfriends
text: we had a great night tonight right even though I did crash your car while trying to steer using only my teeth I've been planning this date for a while but it's simple a simple night out dinner and drinks and then a secondary location for some more drinks a tertiary location for some more drinks a party an after party and after after party waking up in a different time zone I don't know all the details we can just play it by ear but it's a plan I'm really glad that you wanted to have a quiet evening at home just the two of us because I have been dying to try this new recipe move the flip over Julia Child we've got two tickets to flavortown if you don't hurry up with your makeup we are gonna miss our dinner reservation look I know what your face looks like who do you think you're fooling I'm sorry that I snapped at you on the way to our picnic today I it was just such a long walk and I'm sorry that I drank all the lemonade and ate all the food before we even got there but I needed sustenance I was fading to make sure that we go to the best restaurant for our date tonight I came up with a little bracket we can fill in up to 30 restaurants I've got Chili's vs. Applebee's in the first round what are you thinking yeah boy I am killing it on this date tonight I have been so suave all that dating advice I read online has paid off I held the doors open for her I asked all the right questions I am irresistible were you listening to anything I just said look I've got to tell you something something that I've never told anyone before I'm amazed if that I'm not bored of you yet girl you are a work of art you put the Mona Lisa to shame although she's not that attractive to begin with so it's probably a bad comparison well nice and serious apologies for answering honestly when you asked me if your butt look too big in those pants I mean what do you want me to say you want me to say it looks small oh yeah it's smaller than average oh I can barely see it it's so small what what but what are we even talking about I don't even notice it alright it's time for our weekly check-in I'll tell you all the things that I love about you and you tell me all the things you love about me and then we'll move on to opportunities for

title: 16 Personalities as Boyfriends
text: what are we even talking about I don't even notice it alright it's time for our weekly check-in I'll tell you all the things that I love about you and you tell me all the things you love about me and then we'll move on to opportunities for improvement oh I just had a spicy idea on the car ride home let's find something really trivial to argue about for no reason look I normally don't get all touchy-feely like this but I enjoy spending time in your company okay and I hope we can spend more time together in the future at least until we get sick of each other there there I go again getting all sappy pull it together man come on I know we've only been dating for a year this might be moving way too fast but what if we start acknowledging each other in public during daylight hours I've had a really great time with you today it was even better than I imagined it would be as I wrote in my journal last night I mean what just who said that I I don't have a journal what oh I know that look I can tell you just want to turn down the lights real low and share our deepest insecurities and traumas with each other I mean what I don't [Music] while I was trying to drive your truck truck is this a country girl you
